containers.framer-1w8e3we-container:
Drive sales with generative product recommendations

Help customers find the right product, complete their routine, or try something new. Siena knows your customers and makes intelligent, in-the-moment suggestions that drive revenue and retention.
containers.framer-tejwr8-container:
Scale social media engagement and moderation

Turn social interactions into revenue. Siena engages shoppers on social channels, answers product questions, captures buying intent, and converts community engagement into tangible ecommerce growth.
containers.framer-15olgsr-container:
Automate post-purchase complex workflows

From “where’s my order?” to “I want to start my return”, Siena handles it all- updating addresses, generating labels, issuing refunds, and sending replacements in a single flow.
containers.framer-1vlomzq-container:
Put subscription management on autopilot

More loyalty, less churn. Siena makes it easy to skip, pause, or swap- while capturing insights, offering alternatives, and boosting AOV with smart recommendations.
containers.framer-azsqkk-container:
Enhance human collaboration & agent assist

Build or tweak workflows in minutes with AI Assistant. Draft on-brand replies or translations with Copilot. Make follow-ups clear and easy with Collaborative AI Routing that explains every handoff with a note.
containers.framer-qbapak-container:
Enterprise-grade safety and brand control

Trusted by some of the fastest ecommerce and retail companies, our agents meet the highest enterprise standards with guardrails and granular controls that keep every interaction on brand and on policy.
